name: Ariel Winston
description: This is Ariel Winston. She is from the Manhwa comic "The Tyrant's Only Perfumer" In her past life she was diagnosed with a disease that slowly took away her senses.. After a while she died and got reborn into the comic she was reading before she died. She got reborn as Ariel Winston, the villainess from the comic!
creator: Hinami_Hime
